add.sel: /aiscript/attention/actions/do_if[@value='$order.exists or (@$orderdef and $createdefaultorder?)']/do_if[@value='(@$orderdef and $createdefaultorder?) or not $order.requiredskill or (this.combinedskill ge $order.requiredskill)']

debug_text.text: '[GT-Assist] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' - Registered subordinate in GT_Ships registry (inheriting GT order from commander)'
'[GT-Assist] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' - Registered subordinate in GT_Ships registry (inheriting GT order from commander)'

param.name: home
param.value: if $orderdef.$home? then $orderdef.$home else (if $orderdef.$homeStation? then $orderdef.$homeStation else (if $orderdef.$homeSector? then $orderdef.$homeSector else this.assignedcontrolled.sector))

param.name: serveHomeOnly
param.value: if $orderdef.$serveHomeOnly? then $orderdef.$serveHomeOnly else (if $orderdef.$dedicatedServe? then $orderdef.$dedicatedServe else false)

param.name: buyFromPlayer
param.value: if $orderdef.$buyFromPlayer? then $orderdef.$buyFromPlayer else (if $orderdef.$allowPlayerSuppliers? then $orderdef.$allowPlayerSuppliers else true)

param.name: buyFromFaction
param.value: if $orderdef.$buyFromFaction? then $orderdef.$buyFromFaction else (if $orderdef.$allowAiSuppliers? then $orderdef.$allowAiSuppliers else true)

param.name: allowBuildstorage
param.value: if $orderdef.$allowBuildstorage? then $orderdef.$allowBuildstorage else (if $orderdef.$buildStationsOnly? then $orderdef.$buildStationsOnly else true)

param.name: allowIntermediates
param.value: if $orderdef.$allowIntermediates? then $orderdef.$allowIntermediates else (if $orderdef.$allowProducts? then $orderdef.$allowProducts else true)

param.name: ignoretraderules
param.value: if $orderdef.$ignoretraderules? then $orderdef.$ignoretraderules else (if $orderdef.$ignoreTradeRules? then $orderdef.$ignoreTradeRules else false)

set_value.name: global.$GT_Ships.{this.assignedcontrolled}.$InheritedGTDefaultOrderParams
set_value.exact: table[ $OrderId = 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply', $Home = if $orderdef.$home? then $orderdef.$home else (if $orderdef.$homeStation? then $orderdef.$homeStation else (if $orderdef.$homeSector? then $orderdef.$homeSector else this.assignedcontrolled.sector)), $AssignHome = if $orderdef.$assignHome? then $orderdef.$assignHome else false, $JumpDistanceCoverage = if $orderdef.$jumpDistanceCoverage? then $orderdef.$jumpDistanceCoverage else 1, $JumpDistanceBuy = if $orderdef.$jumpDistanceBuy? then $orderdef.$jumpDistanceBuy else 1, $DedicatedServe = if $orderdef.$serveHomeOnly? then $orderdef.$serveHomeOnly else (if $orderdef.$dedicatedServe? then $orderdef.$dedicatedServe else false), $AllowPlayerSuppliers = if $orderdef.$buyFromPlayer? then $orderdef.$buyFromPlayer else (if $orderdef.$allowPlayerSuppliers? then $orderdef.$allowPlayerSuppliers else true), $AllowAiSuppliers = if $orderdef.$buyFromFaction? then $orderdef.$buyFromFaction else (if $orderdef.$allowAiSuppliers? then $orderdef.$allowAiSuppliers else true), $AllowBuildstorage = if $orderdef.$allowBuildstorage? then $orderdef.$allowBuildstorage else (if $orderdef.$buildStationsOnly? then $orderdef.$buildStationsOnly else true), $AllowResources = if $orderdef.$allowResources? then $orderdef.$allowResources else true, $AllowIntermediates = if $orderdef.$allowIntermediates? then $orderdef.$allowIntermediates else (if $orderdef.$allowProducts? then $orderdef.$allowProducts else true), $AllowTradewares = if $orderdef.$allowTradewares? then $orderdef.$allowTradewares else true, $AutoWares = if $orderdef.$autowares? then $orderdef.$autowares else true, $WareBasket = if $orderdef.$warebasket? then $orderdef.$warebasket else [], $IgnoreTradeRules = if $orderdef.$ignoretraderules? then $orderdef.$ignoretraderules else (if $orderdef.$ignoreTradeRules? then $orderdef.$ignoreTradeRules else false), $Notifications = if $orderdef.$notifications? then $orderdef.$notifications else 1, $DebugLevel = if $orderdef.$debuglevel? then $orderdef.$debuglevel else 1 ]

set_value.name: $orderdef.$home
set_value.exact: if $order.$home? then $order.$home else (if $order.$homeStation? then $order.$homeStation else (if $order.$homeSector? then $order.$homeSector else null))

set_value.name: $orderdef.$assignHome
set_value.exact: if $order.$assignHome? then $order.$assignHome else (if $order.$assignToStation? then $order.$assignToStation else false)

set_value.name: $orderdef.$serveHomeOnly
set_value.exact: if $order.$serveHomeOnly? then $order.$serveHomeOnly else (if $order.$dedicatedServe? then $order.$dedicatedServe else false)

set_value.name: $orderdef.$buyFromPlayer
set_value.exact: if $order.$buyFromPlayer? then $order.$buyFromPlayer else (if $order.$allowPlayerSuppliers? then $order.$allowPlayerSuppliers else true)

set_value.name: $orderdef.$buyFromFaction
set_value.exact: if $order.$buyFromFaction? then $order.$buyFromFaction else (if $order.$allowAiSuppliers? then $order.$allowAiSuppliers else true)

set_value.name: $orderdef.$allowBuildstorage
set_value.exact: if $order.$allowBuildstorage? then $order.$allowBuildstorage else (if $order.$buildStationsOnly? then $order.$buildStationsOnly else true)

set_value.name: $orderdef.$allowIntermediates
set_value.exact: if $order.$allowIntermediates? then $order.$allowIntermediates else (if $order.$allowProducts? then $order.$allowProducts else true)

set_value.name: $orderdef.$ignoretraderules
set_value.exact: if $order.$ignoretraderules? then $order.$ignoretraderules else (if $order.$ignoreTradeRules? then $order.$ignoreTradeRules else false)

set_value.name: global.$GT_Ships.{this.assignedcontrolled}.$InheritedGTDefaultOrderParams
set_value.exact: table[ $OrderId = 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply', $Home = if $order.$home? then $order.$home else (if $order.$homeStation? then $order.$homeStation else (if $order.$homeSector? then $order.$homeSector else this.assignedcontrolled.sector)), $AssignHome = if $order.$assignHome? then $order.$assignHome else (if $order.$assignToStation? then $order.$assignToStation else false), $JumpDistanceCoverage = if $order.$jumpDistanceCoverage? then $order.$jumpDistanceCoverage else 1, $JumpDistanceBuy = if $order.$jumpDistanceBuy? then $order.$jumpDistanceBuy else 1, $DedicatedServe = if $order.$serveHomeOnly? then $order.$serveHomeOnly else (if $order.$dedicatedServe? then $order.$dedicatedServe else false), $AllowPlayerSuppliers = if $order.$buyFromPlayer? then $order.$buyFromPlayer else (if $order.$allowPlayerSuppliers? then $order.$allowPlayerSuppliers else true), $AllowAiSuppliers = if $order.$buyFromFaction? then $order.$buyFromFaction else (if $order.$allowAiSuppliers? then $order.$allowAiSuppliers else true), $AllowBuildstorage = if $order.$allowBuildstorage? then $order.$allowBuildstorage else (if $order.$buildStationsOnly? then $order.$buildStationsOnly else true), $AllowResources = if $order.$allowResources? then $order.$allowResources else true, $AllowIntermediates = if $order.$allowIntermediates? then $order.$allowIntermediates else (if $order.$allowProducts? then $order.$allowProducts else true), $AllowTradewares = if $order.$allowTradewares? then $order.$allowTradewares else true, $AutoWares = if $order.$autowares? then $order.$autowares else true, $WareBasket = if $order.$warebasket? then $order.$warebasket else [], $IgnoreTradeRules = if $order.$ignoretraderules? then $order.$ignoretraderules else (if $order.$ignoreTradeRules? then $order.$ignoreTradeRules else false), $Notifications = if $order.$notifications? then $order.$notifications else 1, $DebugLevel = if $order.$debuglevel? then $order.$debuglevel else 1 ]

param.name: home
param.value: if $order.$home? then $order.$home else (if $order.$homeStation? then $order.$homeStation else (if $order.$homeSector? then $order.$homeSector else this.assignedcontrolled.sector))

param.name: assignHome
param.value: if $order.$assignHome? then $order.$assignHome else (if $order.$assignToStation? then $order.$assignToStation else false)

param.name: serveHomeOnly
param.value: if $order.$serveHomeOnly? then $order.$serveHomeOnly else (if $order.$dedicatedServe? then $order.$dedicatedServe else false)

param.name: buyFromPlayer
param.value: if $order.$buyFromPlayer? then $order.$buyFromPlayer else (if $order.$allowPlayerSuppliers? then $order.$allowPlayerSuppliers else true)

param.name: buyFromFaction
param.value: if $order.$buyFromFaction? then $order.$buyFromFaction else (if $order.$allowAiSuppliers? then $order.$allowAiSuppliers else true)

param.name: allowBuildstorage
param.value: if $order.$allowBuildstorage? then $order.$allowBuildstorage else (if $order.$buildStationsOnly? then $order.$buildStationsOnly else true)

param.name: allowIntermediates
param.value: if $order.$allowIntermediates? then $order.$allowIntermediates else (if $order.$allowProducts? then $order.$allowProducts else true)

param.name: ignoretraderules
param.value: if $order.$ignoretraderules? then $order.$ignoretraderules else (if $order.$ignoreTradeRules? then $order.$ignoreTradeRules else false)

set_value.name: global.$GT_Ships.{this.assignedcontrolled}.$InheritedGTDefaultOrderParams
set_value.exact: table[ $OrderId = 'GalaxyTraderMK1', $HomeStation = $orderdef.$homeStation, $MaxSell = $orderdef.$maxsell, $IgnoreTradeRules = $orderdef.$ignoretraderules, $AllowIllegal = $orderdef.$allowillegal, $WareBasket = $orderdef.$warebasket, $SellTarget = $orderdef.$selltarget, $SellSelectionMode = if $orderdef.$sellselectionmode? then $orderdef.$sellselectionmode else 2, $BuyTarget = $orderdef.$buytarget, $BacktrackTolerance = $orderdef.$backtrackTolerance, $LogbookEntries = $orderdef.$logbookentries, $Notifications = $orderdef.$notifications, $FleetCoordination = $orderdef.$fleetcoordination, $DebugLevel = $orderdef.$debuglevel, $Supply = $orderdef.$supply, $MinStorage = $orderdef.$minstorage, $ReturnHome = if $orderdef.$returnhome? then $orderdef.$returnhome else false ]

set_value.name: global.$GT_Ships.{this.assignedcontrolled}.$InheritedGTDefaultOrderParams
set_value.exact: table[ $OrderId = 'GalaxyTraderMK1', $HomeStation = $order.$homeStation, $MaxSell = $order.$maxsell, $IgnoreTradeRules = $order.$ignoretraderules, $AllowIllegal = $order.$allowillegal, $WareBasket = $order.$warebasket, $SellTarget = $order.$selltarget, $SellSelectionMode = if $order.$sellselectionmode? then $order.$sellselectionmode else 2, $BuyTarget = $order.$buytarget, $BacktrackTolerance = $order.$backtrackTolerance, $LogbookEntries = $order.$logbookentries, $Notifications = $order.$notifications, $FleetCoordination = $order.$fleetcoordination, $DebugLevel = $order.$debuglevel, $Supply = $order.$supply, $MinStorage = $order.$minstorage, $ReturnHome = if $order.$returnhome? then $order.$returnhome else false ]

add.sel: //aiscript[@name='order.assist']/attention/actions/do_if[@value='not $added?']/debug_text[@filter='error' and contains(@text, 'default order not inherited from commander.')]

debug_text.text: '[GT-Assist] PROMOTION FIX: Attempting to restore default order for promoted commander (subordinate: ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ')'
'[GT-Assist] PROMOTION FIX: Commander found: ' + $gtCommander.idcode + ', defaultorder exists: ' + (if $defaultOrderExists then 'yes' else 'no') + ', defaultorder value: ' + $defaultOrderId

'[GT-Assist] PROMOTION FIX: Commander default order is non-actionable during promotion (' + (if @$gtCommander.defaultorder.id then @$gtCommander.defaultorder.id else 'null') + ') - restoring GT default order'

set_value.name: $gtParams
set_value.exact: table[ $OrderId = 'GalaxyTraderMK3', $Home = if $orderdef.$home? then $orderdef.$home else (if this.assignedcontrolled.sector? then this.assignedcontrolled.sector else $gtCommander.sector), $MaxBuy = $orderdef.$maxbuy, $MaxSell = $orderdef.$maxsell, $AutoWares = $orderdef.$autowares, $WareBasket = $orderdef.$warebasket, $AllowIllegal = $orderdef.$allowillegal, $EnforceRouteIllegalLegality = $orderdef.$enforceRouteIllegalLegality, $DistancePenalty = $orderdef.$distancepenalty, $Notifications = $orderdef.$notifications, $CargoTarget = $orderdef.$cargotarget, $MarketUpdateFreq = $orderdef.$marketupdatefreq, $DebugLevel = $orderdef.$debuglevel, $TradeEval = $orderdef.$tradeeval ]

set_value.name: $gtParams
set_value.exact: table[ $OrderId = 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply', $Home = if $orderdef.$home? then $orderdef.$home else (if $orderdef.$homeStation? then $orderdef.$homeStation else (if $orderdef.$homeSector? then $orderdef.$homeSector else (if this.assignedcontrolled.sector? then this.assignedcontrolled.sector else $gtCommander.sector))), $AssignHome = $orderdef.$assignHome, $JumpDistanceCoverage = $orderdef.$jumpDistanceCoverage, $JumpDistanceBuy = $orderdef.$jumpDistanceBuy, $DedicatedServe = if $orderdef.$serveHomeOnly? then $orderdef.$serveHomeOnly else $orderdef.$dedicatedServe, $AllowPlayerSuppliers = if $orderdef.$buyFromPlayer? then $orderdef.$buyFromPlayer else $orderdef.$allowPlayerSuppliers, $AllowAiSuppliers = if $orderdef.$buyFromFaction? then $orderdef.$buyFromFaction else $orderdef.$allowAiSuppliers, $AllowBuildstorage = $orderdef.$allowBuildstorage, $AllowResources = $orderdef.$allowResources, $AllowIntermediates = $orderdef.$allowIntermediates, $AllowTradewares = $orderdef.$allowTradewares, $AutoWares = $orderdef.$autowares, $WareBasket = $orderdef.$warebasket, $MaxTrades = $orderdef.$maxTrades, $BacktrackTolerance = $orderdef.$backtrackTolerance, $MinCargoUsed = $orderdef.$minCargoUsed, $PlayerBuyMod = $orderdef.$playerBuyMod, $AllowIllegal = $orderdef.$allowillegal, $EnforceRouteIllegalLegality = $orderdef.$enforceRouteIllegalLegality, $IgnoreCarrierAux = $orderdef.$ignorecarrieraux, $IgnoreTradeRules = $orderdef.$ignoretraderules, $IgnoreMK1Supply = $orderdef.$ignoremk1supply, $LogbookEntries = $orderdef.$logbookentries, $DistancePenalty = $orderdef.$distancepenalty, $Notifications = $orderdef.$notifications, $CargoTarget = $orderdef.$cargotarget, $MarketUpdateFreq = $orderdef.$marketupdatefreq, $DebugLevel = $orderdef.$debuglevel ]

set_value.name: $gtParams
set_value.exact: table[ $OrderId = 'GalaxyTraderMK1', $HomeStation = $orderdef.$homeStation, $MaxSell = $orderdef.$maxsell, $IgnoreTradeRules = $orderdef.$ignoretraderules, $AllowIllegal = $orderdef.$allowillegal, $WareBasket = $orderdef.$warebasket, $SellTarget = $orderdef.$selltarget, $SellSelectionMode = if $orderdef.$sellselectionmode? then $orderdef.$sellselectionmode else 2, $BuyTarget = $orderdef.$buytarget, $BacktrackTolerance = $orderdef.$backtrackTolerance, $LogbookEntries = $orderdef.$logbookentries, $Notifications = $orderdef.$notifications, $FleetCoordination = $orderdef.$fleetcoordination, $DebugLevel = $orderdef.$debuglevel, $Supply = $orderdef.$supply, $MinStorage = $orderdef.$minstorage, $ReturnHome = if $orderdef.$returnhome? then $orderdef.$returnhome else false ]

do_if.value: not $gtParams? and this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder? and @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.$baseorder? and @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3'

set_value.name: $gtParams
set_value.exact: table[ $OrderId = 'GalaxyTraderMK3', $Home = if $gtBaseOrder.$home? then $gtBaseOrder.$home else (if this.assignedcontrolled.sector? then this.assignedcontrolled.sector else $gtCommander.sector), $MaxBuy = $gtBaseOrder.$maxbuy, $MaxSell = $gtBaseOrder.$maxsell, $AutoWares = $gtBaseOrder.$autowares, $WareBasket = $gtBaseOrder.$warebasket, $AllowIllegal = $gtBaseOrder.$allowillegal, $EnforceRouteIllegalLegality = $gtBaseOrder.$enforceRouteIllegalLegality, $DistancePenalty = $gtBaseOrder.$distancepenalty, $Notifications = $gtBaseOrder.$notifications, $CargoTarget = $gtBaseOrder.$cargotarget, $MarketUpdateFreq = $gtBaseOrder.$marketupdatefreq, $DebugLevel = $gtBaseOrder.$debuglevel, $TradeEval = $gtBaseOrder.$tradeeval ]

do_elseif.value: not $gtParams? and this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder? and @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.$baseorder? and @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply'

set_value.name: $gtParams
set_value.exact: table[ $OrderId = 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply', $Home = if $gtBaseOrder.$home? then $gtBaseOrder.$home else (if $gtBaseOrder.$homeStation? then $gtBaseOrder.$homeStation else (if $gtBaseOrder.$homeSector? then $gtBaseOrder.$homeSector else (if this.assignedcontrolled.sector? then this.assignedcontrolled.sector else $gtCommander.sector))), $AssignHome = $gtBaseOrder.$assignHome, $JumpDistanceCoverage = $gtBaseOrder.$jumpDistanceCoverage, $JumpDistanceBuy = $gtBaseOrder.$jumpDistanceBuy, $DedicatedServe = if $gtBaseOrder.$serveHomeOnly? then $gtBaseOrder.$serveHomeOnly else $gtBaseOrder.$dedicatedServe, $AllowPlayerSuppliers = if $gtBaseOrder.$buyFromPlayer? then $gtBaseOrder.$buyFromPlayer else $gtBaseOrder.$allowPlayerSuppliers, $AllowAiSuppliers = if $gtBaseOrder.$buyFromFaction? then $gtBaseOrder.$buyFromFaction else $gtBaseOrder.$allowAiSuppliers, $AllowBuildstorage = $gtBaseOrder.$allowBuildstorage, $AllowResources = $gtBaseOrder.$allowResources, $AllowIntermediates = $gtBaseOrder.$allowIntermediates, $AllowTradewares = $gtBaseOrder.$allowTradewares, $AutoWares = $gtBaseOrder.$autowares, $WareBasket = $gtBaseOrder.$warebasket, $MaxTrades = $gtBaseOrder.$maxTrades, $BacktrackTolerance = $gtBaseOrder.$backtrackTolerance, $MinCargoUsed = $gtBaseOrder.$minCargoUsed, $PlayerBuyMod = $gtBaseOrder.$playerBuyMod, $AllowIllegal = $gtBaseOrder.$allowillegal, $EnforceRouteIllegalLegality = $gtBaseOrder.$enforceRouteIllegalLegality, $IgnoreCarrierAux = $gtBaseOrder.$ignorecarrieraux, $IgnoreTradeRules = $gtBaseOrder.$ignoretraderules, $IgnoreMK1Supply = $gtBaseOrder.$ignoremk1supply, $LogbookEntries = $gtBaseOrder.$logbookentries, $DistancePenalty = $gtBaseOrder.$distancepenalty, $Notifications = $gtBaseOrder.$notifications, $CargoTarget = $gtBaseOrder.$cargotarget, $MarketUpdateFreq = $gtBaseOrder.$marketupdatefreq, $DebugLevel = $gtBaseOrder.$debuglevel ]

do_elseif.value: not $gtParams? and this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder? and @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.$baseorder? and @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK1' and this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.$baseorder.$homeStation?

set_value.name: $gtParams
set_value.exact: table[ $OrderId = 'GalaxyTraderMK1', $HomeStation = $gtBaseOrder.$homeStation, $MaxSell = $gtBaseOrder.$maxsell, $IgnoreTradeRules = $gtBaseOrder.$ignoretraderules, $AllowIllegal = $gtBaseOrder.$allowillegal, $WareBasket = $gtBaseOrder.$warebasket, $SellTarget = $gtBaseOrder.$selltarget, $SellSelectionMode = if $gtBaseOrder.$sellselectionmode? then $gtBaseOrder.$sellselectionmode else 2, $BuyTarget = $gtBaseOrder.$buytarget, $BacktrackTolerance = $gtBaseOrder.$backtrackTolerance, $LogbookEntries = $gtBaseOrder.$logbookentries, $Notifications = $gtBaseOrder.$notifications, $FleetCoordination = $gtBaseOrder.$fleetcoordination, $DebugLevel = $gtBaseOrder.$debuglevel, $Supply = $gtBaseOrder.$supply, $MinStorage = $gtBaseOrder.$minstorage, $ReturnHome = if $gtBaseOrder.$returnhome? then $gtBaseOrder.$returnhome else false ]

do_elseif.value: not $gtParams? and this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder? and @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.$baseorder? and @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK2' and this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.$baseorder.$sourceStation?

not $gtParams? and this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder? and @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.$baseorder? and @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyMiner' and (this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.$baseorder.$homeSector? or this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.$baseorder.$homeStation?)

do_if.value: not $gtParams? and global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.{$gtCommander}? and global.$GT_Ships.{$gtCommander}.$InheritedGTDefaultOrderParams?
not $gtParams? and $otherSubordinate.exists and global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.{$otherSubordinate}? and global.$GT_Ships.{$otherSubordinate}.$InheritedGTDefaultOrderParams?
not $gtParams? and global.$GT_AIParameters? and global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}? and global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$HomeBase?

set_value.name: $gtParams
set_value.exact: table[ $OrderId = 'GalaxyTraderMK3', $Home = $homeSector, $MaxBuy = if global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$MaxBuy? then global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$MaxBuy else 100, $MaxSell = if global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$MaxSell? then global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$MaxSell else 100, $AutoWares = if global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$AutoWares? then global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$AutoWares else true, $WareBasket = if global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$WareBasket? then global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$WareBasket else [], $AllowIllegal = if global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$AllowIllegal? then global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$AllowIllegal else false, $EnforceRouteIllegalLegality = if global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$EnforceRouteIllegalLegality? then global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$EnforceRouteIllegalLegality else false, $DistancePenalty = if global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$DistancePenalty? then global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$DistancePenalty else 0.1, $Notifications = if global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$Notifications? then global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$Notifications else true, $CargoTarget = if global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$CargoTarget? then global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$CargoTarget else 0.9, $MarketUpdateFreq = if global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$MarketUpdateFreq? then global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$MarketUpdateFreq else 300, $DebugLevel = if global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$DebugLevel? then global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$DebugLevel else 1, $TradeEval = if global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$TradeEval? then global.$GT_AIParameters.{$gtCommander}.$TradeEval else 'profit' ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-Assist] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ': Restored missing default GT order on promoted commander ' + $gtCommander.idcode + ' (promotion window; source: ' + $paramsSource + ')'

'[GT-Assist] WARNING: ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ': Could not restore default GT order on promoted commander ' + $gtCommander.idcode + ' (params source unresolved; orderdef.id=' + (if @$orderdef.$id then @$orderdef.$id else 'null') + ', assist.baseorder=' + (if this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder? and this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.$baseorder? and @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.$baseorder.id then @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.$baseorder.id else 'null') + ', commander.default=' + (if @$gtCommander.defaultorder.id then @$gtCommander.defaultorder.id else 'null') + ')'

'[GT-Assist] PROMOTION FIX: Skipping fix - commander check failed (commander exists: ' + (if $gtCommanderCheck? and $gtCommanderCheck.exists then 'yes' else 'no') + ', is player owned: ' + (if $gtCommanderCheck? and $gtCommanderCheck.exists and $gtCommanderCheck.isplayerowned then 'yes' else 'no') + ')'

set_value.name: global.$GT_Ship_State.{this.assignedcontrolled}
set_value.exact: table[ $OperationalState = 'idle', $SubordinateState = 'independent', $Commander = null, $CommanderHasGT = false, $HasGTOrder = false, $HasAssistOrder = false, $ActiveTradeOrders = 0, $LastStateUpdate = player.age, $MacroShipName = null, $OriginalShipName = null ]

do_if.value: (not $oldCommander.exists or $oldCommander == null) and this.assignedcontrolled.commander? and this.assignedcontrolled.commander.exists

debug_text.text: '[GT-Assist] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' - NEWLY ASSIGNED to commander ' + this.assignedcontrolled.commander.idcode + ' (was idle before) - skipping cleanup'
'[GT-Assist] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' - Ship is in GT_Ships registry - treating as GT subordinate removal'

do_if.value: this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder? and (@this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' or @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK2' or @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK1' or @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyMiner')
not $stillHasGTOrder and this.assignedcontrolled.commander? and this.assignedcontrolled.commander.exists and this.assignedcontrolled.commander != this.assignedcontrolled

debug_text.text: '[GT-State] Phase 7: ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' - Subordinate removed from GT commander (detected in Assist order) - GT order truly cancelled'
'[GT-State] Phase 7: ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' - Subordinate removed from GT commander BUT ship still has GT order (direct or via new commander) - NOT sending cancellation'

do_if.value: this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder? and (@this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' or @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK2' or @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK1' or @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyMiner')

signal_objects.param2: table[ $Ship = this.assignedcontrolled, $Pilot = this.assignedcontrolled.pilot, $Reason = 'Subordinate removed from GT commander - restoring original name', $OriginalName = $originalName ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-State] Phase 7: Name restoration signal sent for ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' (removed from GT commander, original name: ' + $originalName + ')'
'[GT-Assist] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' - Assist on_abort ignored during DockAndReturnHome handoff'

do_if.value: not $isGTControlled and this.assignedcontrolled.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.assignedcontrolled.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.assignedcontrolled.pilot}.$OriginalShipName?

($pilotData.$Ship? and $pilotData.$Ship == this.assignedcontrolled) or ($pilotData.$AssociatedShip? and $pilotData.$AssociatedShip == this.assignedcontrolled) or ($pilotData.$ShipID? and $pilotData.$ShipID == this.assignedcontrolled.idcode)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Assist] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' - Assist order aborted - checking if GT cleanup needed'

do_if.value: this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder? and (@this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' or @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK2' or @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK1' or @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyMiner')
this.assignedcontrolled.commander? and this.assignedcontrolled.commander.exists and this.assignedcontrolled.commander != this.assignedcontrolled

debug_text.text: '[GT-Assist] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' - Removed stale GT_Ships registry entry (orphaned state, no GT control)'
'[GT-Assist] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' - Ship is in GT_Ships registry - was GT-controlled'
'[GT-Assist] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' - Ship was tracked as subordinate to GT commander - needs cleanup'

do_if.value: not $wasGTControlled and this.assignedcontrolled.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.assignedcontrolled.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.assignedcontrolled.pilot}.$OriginalShipName?

($pilotData.$Ship? and $pilotData.$Ship == this.assignedcontrolled) or ($pilotData.$AssociatedShip? and $pilotData.$AssociatedShip == this.assignedcontrolled) or ($pilotData.$ShipID? and $pilotData.$ShipID == this.assignedcontrolled.idcode)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Assist] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' - pilot registry still linked during Assist abort - needs cleanup'

set_value.name: $debugOrdersStr
set_value.exact: if $debugOrdersList.count gt 0 then $debugOrdersList.{1} + (if $debugOrdersList.count gt 1 then ', ' + $debugOrdersList.{2} else '') + (if $debugOrdersList.count gt 2 then ', ' + $debugOrdersList.{3} else '') + (if $debugOrdersList.count gt 3 then ', ' + $debugOrdersList.{4} else '') + (if $debugOrdersList.count gt 4 then ', ...' else '') else 'NONE'

debug_text.text: '[GT-Assist] REMOVAL DETECTION DEBUG: ' + $debugShip.idcode + ' - COMPREHENSIVE STATE'
'[GT-Assist] Ship: ' + $debugShip.idcode + ' (' + (if $debugShip.knownname then $debugShip.knownname else 'UNNAMED') + ')'
'[GT-Assist] Pilot: ' + $debugPilotName + (if $debugPilot? then ' (exists)' else ' (NONE)')
'[GT-Assist] Default Order: ' + (if $debugDefaultOrder then $debugDefaultOrder else 'NONE')
'[GT-Assist] Active Orders (' + $debugOrdersCount + '): ' + $debugOrdersStr
'[GT-Assist] Commander: ' + $debugCommanderId + ' (Order: ' + $debugCommanderOrder + ')'
'[GT-Assist] GT Status: Direct=' + $debugHasDirectGT + ', ViaCommander=' + $debugHasGTCommander + ', InRegistry=' + $debugInRegistry
'[GT-Assist] State: SubordinateState=' + $debugSubordinateState + ', CommanderHasGT=' + $debugCommanderHasGT

do_if.value: this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder? and (@this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' or @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK2' or @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK1' or @this.assignedcontrolled.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyMiner')
this.assignedcontrolled.commander? and this.assignedcontrolled.commander.exists and this.assignedcontrolled.commander != this.assignedcontrolled

debug_text.text: '[GT-Assist] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' - NEWLY ASSIGNED to GT commander ' + this.assignedcontrolled.commander.idcode + ' - skipping cleanup (Assist order will restart)'

do_if.value: this.assignedcontrolled.commander? and this.assignedcontrolled.commander.exists and this.assignedcontrolled.commander != this.assignedcontrolled
$wasSubordinateToGT and not $reassignedToGTCommander and not $newlyAssignedToGTCommander and not ($isStillSubordinate and $stillHasGTCommander) and not $promotionTransitionLikely

debug_text.text: '[GT-Assist] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' - Assist order aborted (subordinate removed from GT commander) - triggering cleanup unconditionally'

set_value.name: global.$GT_Ship_State.{this.assignedcontrolled}
set_value.exact: table[ $OperationalState = 'orphaned', $SubordinateState = 'orphaned', $Commander = null, $CommanderHasGT = false, $HasGTOrder = false, $HasAssistOrder = false, $ActiveTradeOrders = 0, $LastStateUpdate = player.age ]

signal_objects.param2: table[ $Ship = this.assignedcontrolled, $Pilot = $pilot, $Reason = 'Assist order aborted - GT order lost - restoring original name', $OriginalName = $originalName ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-Assist] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' - Cleanup signals sent (on_abort handler)'
'[GT-Assist] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' - Assist abort in promotion handoff window (Assist + no commander). Deferring orphan cleanup verification.'
'[GT-Assist] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' - Ship has direct GT order - no cleanup needed'
'[GT-Assist] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' - Ship reassigned to new GT commander - no cleanup needed'
'[GT-Assist] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' - Default order still Assist, commander still has GT - normal restart (scheduling delayed verification as fallback)'

set_value.name: global.$GT_CleanupIntent.{this.assignedcontrolled}
set_value.exact: table[ $Active = true, $StartTime = player.age, $ExpireTime = player.age + 8s, $Source = 'ASSIST_ABORT_FALLBACK', $TraceId = $cleanupTraceId, $DefaultOrderAtSignal = $subDefaultOrder, $CommanderAtSignal = if @$oldCommander.exists then @$oldCommander.idcode else 'NONE' ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-Assist] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' - Scheduled delayed verification with detach intent fallback (DetectSubordinateRemoval may not have fired)'
'[GT-Assist] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' - Default order still Assist but commander lost GT order - scheduling delayed verification (5s)'

'[GT-Assist] ' + this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' - Ship not subordinate to GT commander (default order: ' + (if $currentDefaultOrder then $currentDefaultOrder else 'NONE') + ') - no cleanup needed'
